hero.line1: Ubutumwa bwizewe ku muntu uwo ari we wese, aho ari ho hose — hamwe
hero.sub: Shaka nimero ya terefone itekanye ku buntu yo guhamagara no kohereza ubutumwa bugufi ku isi yose ukoresheje Wi-Fi cyangwa amakuru. Ishimire uburyo bwo gushakisha amakuru kuva ku mpera kugeza ku mpera, ubutumwa buzimira, no guhamagara ijwi/videwo bya HD — hamwe n'ibikoresho byubatswemo bigufasha gukomeza guhuza amakuru n'abandi.
hero.freeNote: Guhamagara no kohereza ubutumwa bugufi ni ubuntu. Ubuhanga bwo gukora imibonano mpuzabitsina buhanitse n'ibikoresho byo mu rwego rwo hejuru bisaba kuvugururwa.

esim.title: Chatforia eSIM

esim.noValidInstallLink: Umukozi wawe ntabwo aratanga umurongo wemewe wo gushyiramo. Urashobora gukoresha ibisobanuro byo gukoresha intoki biri hepfo mugihe bihari.
esim.installationSupportText: Intambwe zo gushyiraho eSIM zishobora gutandukana bitewe n'igikoresho. Menya neza ko iPhone yawe ifunguye kandi ihuye na eSIM mbere yo kuyishyiraho. Niba kuyishyiraho mu buryo butaziguye bitaboneka, koresha ibisobanuro byo kuyikoresha byavuzwe haruguru muri Igenamiterere > Telefoni > Ongeraho eSIM.

instructions.step1: Fungura igenamiterere ry'amakuru ya telefoni yawe cyangwa telefoni igendanwa.
instructions.step2: Hitamo Ongeraho eSIM cyangwa Scan QR Code.
instructions.step3: Skena iyi kode ya QR hanyuma ukurikize intambwe ziri kuri ecran kugira ngo urangize kuyikoresha.

disclaimer.devices: Paki z'amakuru za eSIM zisaba igikoresho gikorana na eSIM kandi kidafunguye. Kuboneka biratandukanye bitewe na terefone, umuyoboro wayo, n'igihugu. Uburyo bwo gukwirakwiza amakuru n'umuvuduko biratandukanye bitewe n'akarere.
disclaimer.fairUse: Amakuru yihuta cyane ashobora kugengwa n'imipaka y'ikoreshwa ry'amakuru, imiterere y'umuyoboro w'itumanaho wo mu gace runaka, ndetse n'uburyo amakuru aboneka mu karere runaka.

family.disclaimer: Paki z'imiryango zikora cyangwa zikongera amakuru rusange. Ushobora gutumira no gukuraho abanyamuryango igihe icyo ari cyo cyose.
family.footnote: Paki z'imiryango zisangira amakuru amwe kuri konti za Chatforia zihujwe. Kuboneka n'aho bigarukira biterwa n'amategeko y'igihugu cyawe n'ay'aho utuye.

why.title: Impamvu abantu bimukira kuri Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia iguha nimero ya terefone nyayo, ubusemuzi bw'ubwenge, n'inzira isobanutse yo gukoresha nta matangazo igihe witeguye.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Amatangazo yoroshye kuri Ubuntu, kuvugurura byoroshye Plus igihe witeguye, kandi ibikoresho bya Premium TextNow ntabyo itanga.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Porogaramu igezweho, igishushanyo mbonera cy’isi yose, n’ubuhinduzi bwubatswemo aho kuba uburyo bwa kera bwo kohereza ubutumwa.

messengers.title: Porogaramu zo kuganira na Chatforia vs.
messengers.body: Ohereza ubutumwa bugufi kuri nomero za terefone nyazo — ntabwo ari abandi bakoresha porogaramu gusa — ufite ubuhanga bwo gukora imibonano mpuzabitsina (AI) n'imiterere yayo. Ni byiza niba ukomoka kuri porogaramu nka TextFree cyangwa TextMe.

feature.aiTools: Ibikoresho bya AI (kwandika bundi bushya, gusubiza, incamake)

why.disclaimer: Kugereranya bishingiye ku makuru aboneka ku mugaragaro kandi bishobora guhinduka uko igihe kigenda gihita. Izindi porogaramu zo kohererezanya ubutumwa bugufi ku buntu nka TextFree cyangwa TextMe muri rusange zisa na TextNow.

faq.title: Ibibazo Bikunze Kubazwa ku Ibiciro n'Igenamigambi

free.q: Ese koko gahunda y'ubuntu ni ubuntu?
free.a: Yego. Gahunda y'ubuntu irimo nimero ya Chatforia, guhamagara, no kohererezanya ubutumwa hamwe n'amatangazo. Ushobora kuguma kuri Ubuntu igihe cyose ubyifuza, cyangwa ukavugurura kugira ngo ukureho amatangazo no gufungura ibindi bintu.

plusPremium.q: Ni irihe tandukaniro riri hagati ya Plus na Premium?
plusPremium.a: Byongeye kandi, bikuraho amatangazo kandi bikongera amateka y'ubutumwa bwawe — ni byiza cyane ku ikoreshwa rya buri munsi. Premium yongeraho uburyo bwo guhindura amakuru, ibikoresho bya AI byo kwandika no gusubiza, ndetse n'ubufasha bw'ibanze ku bakoresha cyane.

esim.q: Ni hehe eSIM data packs ikorera?
esim.a: Chatforia Mobile ikoresha uburyo bwo gukwirakwiza amakuru kuri eSIM ku isi hose. Kuboneka kwayo biterwa n'igihugu cyawe n'igikoresho cyawe. Uzabona amahitamo ashyigikiwe mu gihe cyo kuyikoresha muri porogaramu.

cancel.q: Ese nshobora gusesa cyangwa guhindura gahunda igihe icyo ari cyo cyose?
cancel.a: Yego. Ushobora gucunga cyangwa guhagarika kwiyandikisha kwawe uhereye ku ipaji yo kwishyurira muri porogaramu. Impinduka zitangira gukoreshwa mu mpera z'igihe cyo kwishyurira.

family.a: Paki z'imiryango zikora ihuriro ry'amakuru ahuriweho kuri konti nyinshi za Chatforia. Umuntu umwe ni we wishyura fagitire, kandi ushobora gutumira cyangwa gukuraho abanyamuryango no gushyiraho imipaka kuri buri muntu.

forgotPassword.title: Wibagiwe ijambo ry'ibanga

forgotPassword.genericError: Ntibishoboka gutunganya ubusabe. Nyamuneka ongera ugerageze mu kanya gato.
forgotPassword.sentHelper: Niba hari konti iri kuri iyo imeri, twohereje umurongo wo gusubiza ijambo ry'ibanga. Bishobora gufata iminota mike kugira ngo igere. Menya neza ko warebye muri dosiye yawe ya spam cyangwa iyamamaza.

support.sendError: Ntabwo byashobokaga kohereza. Ohereza ubutumwa kuri support@chatforia.com.
support.actionFailed: Ntabwo byashobotse kurangiza icyo gikorwa. Nyamuneka ongera ugerageze.
support.ticketCreated: Ntabwo twashoboye gukemura iki kibazo mu buryo bwikora. Ikipe yacu izakurikirana ikibazo.
support.escalationMessage: Ntabwo twashoboye gukemura iki kibazo mu buryo bwikora. Ikipe yacu izakurikirana ikibazo.
support.genericError: Hari ikintu kitagenze neza. Nyamuneka ongera ugerageze.
support.resolvedInstantly: Ikibazo cyakemutse ako kanya — nta tike ikenewe.

account.q: Nigute nakora cyangwa nkagarura konti yanjye?
account.a: Kuramo porogaramu cyangwa ukoreshe interineti, kanda kuri "Huza konti", genzura imeri/terefone yawe. Kugira ngo uyigarure, koresha "Wibagiwe ijambo ry'ibanga".

privacy.q: Ese ubutumwa bushobora guhindurwa kuva ku iherezo kugeza ku rindi?
privacy.a: Yego. Ubutumwa n'amahamagara bishyirwa mu buryo bwa "encrypted" kuva ku iherezo kugeza ku iherezo. Ni wowe n'uwakira ubutumwa gusa mushobora kubisoma.

translate.q: Guhindura inyandiko ako kanya bikora gute?
translate.a: Koresha "Guhindura mu buryo bwikora" mu Igenamiterere → Imiterere n'Ururimi. Duhindura mu gikoresho aho gishyigikiwe, bitabaye ibyo dukoresheje API zizewe zifite amakuru make cyane.

contact.a: Twandikire kuri support@chatforia.com. Shyiramo amashusho y'ifoto na verisiyo ya porogaramu yawe.

gettingStarted.title: Gutangira
gettingStarted.subtitle: Utangiye vuba muri Chatforia? Iyi gahunda yihuse yerekana ibintu by'ingenzi kugira ngo ubashe gukora neza mu minota mike.

alert.text: Iyi mfashanyigisho izakura uko tuzatangiza ibintu bishya. Niba hari ikintu kibura, tubitumenyeshe binyuze kuri

section1.title: 1) Fungura konti yawe
section1.prefsStart: Muri porogaramu, fungura Igenamiterere kugira ngo ushyireho ibyo ukunda

section2.title: 2) Tangira ubutumwa
section2.item1: Kora DM cyangwa Group hanyuma wohereze ubutumwa bwawe bwa mbere.
section2.item2: Koresha ubusemuzi bwihuse kugira ngo uganire mu ndimi zirenga 100.
section2.item3: Gerageza kuburizamo ubutumwa hanyuma usome inyemezabwishyu muri Profile → Privacy.

section3.title: 3) Komeza ukomeze
section3.item1: Ushobora kuvugurura ukajya kuri gahunda yishyurwa igihe icyo ari cyo cyose uri muri porogaramu.
section3.item2: Iyo umaze kwinjira, ushobora guhuza izindi mashini no gushyiraho uburyo bwo kubika amakuru buhishe buturutse ku magenamiterere ari muri porogaramu.
section3.item2Part1: Iyo umaze kwinjira, ushobora guhuza izindi mashini no gushyiraho uburyo bwo kubika amakuru buhishe buturutse ku magenamiterere ari muri porogaramu.

howItWorks.title: Uburyo Chatforia Ikora
howItWorks.intro: Chatforia yagenewe gutuma itumanaho ryoroha, ryihuse kandi riboneka. Gutangira bisaba intambwe nke gusa.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Iyandikishe ukoresheje imeri yawe cyangwa izina ryawe ry'ukoresha kugira ngo ukore konti yawe ya Chatforia.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Huza n'abandi uhitamo abo muvugana cyangwa utangize ibiganiro bishya.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Ubutumwa butangwa vuba kugira ngo butange uburyo bworoshye bwo gutumanaho.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Ubuhinduzi bwubatswemo bufasha abakoresha kuvugana mu ndimi zitandukanye.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Genzura ibyo ukunda, abo muvugana, n'igenamiterere ry'itumanaho.

safety.title: Amabwiriza y'Umutekano n'Umuryango
safety.intro: Chatforia yiyemeje kubungabunga ibidukikije birangwa n'umutekano n'icyubahiro ku bakoresha bose. Aya mabwiriza afasha kwemeza ko buri wese agira ibihe byiza.
safety.respectDesc: Abakoresha basabwa kuvugana mu buryo burangwa no kubahana. Gutoteza, guhohotera, cyangwa imyitwarire mibi ntibyemewe.

prohibited.spam: Uburiganya cyangwa uburyo bwo gukoresha ubutumwa bwa Spam

tools.report: Garagaza imyitwarire cyangwa ibikubiye mu nyandiko bidakwiye
tools.block: Guhagarika abakoresha kugira ngo hirindwe ko habaho kongera gukorana

safety.enforcementDesc: Dushobora gufata ingamba ku makonti anyuranyije n'aya mabwiriza, harimo n'imiburo, amabwiriza, cyangwa kuvanwa burundu kuri urwo rubuga.

whyMessaging.title: Impamvu urubuga rwo kohereza ubutumwa rufite akamaro kurusha mbere hose
whyMessaging.intro: Uburyo bwo kohereza ubutumwa bwabaye bumwe mu buryo bw'ingenzi mu itumanaho muri iki gihe. Kuva ku biganiro bwite kugeza ku mikoranire y'ubucuruzi, porogaramu zo kohereza ubutumwa zemerera abantu gukomeza guhuza amakuru ako kanya kandi neza.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: Abantu bishingikiriza kuri porogaramu zo kohererezanya ubutumwa buri munsi kugira ngo baganire n'inshuti, umuryango, n'abo bakorana. Byaba ari amakuru mashya cyangwa ikiganiro kirekire, kohereza ubutumwa bitanga uburyo bworoshye kandi bworoshye bwo gukomeza kuvugana.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: Kimwe mu byiza by'ingenzi bya porogaramu zo kohereza ubutumwa ni umuvuduko wazo. Ubutumwa butangwa ako kanya, bigatuma abakoresha babasha kuvugana mu gihe nyacyo. Uru rwego rwo koroshya ubutumwa rwatumye ubutumwa buba uburyo bwiza bwo gutumanaho ku bantu benshi.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Uburyo bwo kohererezanya ubutumwa buhuza abantu hirya no hino ku isi. Hamwe no gukoresha interineti, abakoresha bashobora kuvugana aho bari hose, bigatuma byoroha kubaka umubano no gukorana mu mahanga.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Uburyo bwo kohereza ubutumwa bugezweho bwibanda ku guha abakoresha ububasha bwo kugenzura amakuru yabo n'ibiganiro byabo. Ibintu nk'uburyo bwo gukingira amakuru, igenamiterere ry'ubuzima bwite, n'uburyo bwo kugenzura ubutumwa bituma abakoresha bavugana mu bwisanzure.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Ubutumwa bukomeje gutera imbere hamwe n'ibintu bishya nko gusubiza hakoreshejwe ubuhanga bwa "AI", guhindura no gusangira amakuru mu buryo butandukanye. Uko ikoranabuhanga rigenda ritera imbere, urubuga rwo kohereza ubutumwa ruzarushaho kuba rukomeye kandi rushobora gukoreshwa mu buryo butandukanye.
whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia yubatswe hifashishijwe aya mahame mu mutwe, itanga uburyo bwo kohereza ubutumwa bwihuse, bwizewe kandi bworoshye gukoreshwa ku isi ifitanye isano.

global.title: Ahazaza h'Itumanaho Mpuzamahanga
global.intro: Itumanaho ryateye imbere cyane mu myaka mike ishize. Ibyari bisanzwe bisaba guhamagara kuri telefoni cyangwa inama imbonankubone ubu bishobora gukorwa vuba binyuze mu buryo bwo kohererezanya ubutumwa. Uko ikoranabuhanga rikomeza gutera imbere, itumanaho mpuzamahanga ririmo kwihuta, kuboneka ku bantu benshi, no kumenyekanisha amakuru yose.
global.barriersDesc: Imwe mu mpinduka zikomeye mu itumanaho ni ukugabanya inzitizi z’uturere. Abantu ubu bashobora kuvugana n’abandi hirya no hino ku isi mu gihe gito. Byaba ari mu biganiro bwite, mu bucuruzi, cyangwa mu bufatanye, imbuga zo kohererezanya ubutumwa zatumye intera igabanuka cyane.
global.translationDesc: Ubusanzwe ururimi rwabaye imwe mu mbogamizi zikomeye ku itumanaho mpuzamahanga. Muri iki gihe, ibikoresho by’ubuhinduzi byubatswemo bifasha kuziba icyo cyuho. Imbuga nka Chatforia zemerera abakoresha kuvugana byoroshye nubwo bavuga indimi zitandukanye, bigatuma habaho amahirwe mashya yo guhuza no kumvikana.
global.realtimeTitle: Uburyo bwo guhuza mu gihe nyacyo
global.realtimeDesc: Umuvuduko ni ikintu cy'ingenzi kigira uruhare mu gutumanaho kwa none. Abakoresha biteze ko ubutumwa butangwa vuba, kandi ibikorwa remezo bigezweho bishyigikira icyo cyifuzo. Ubutumwa bwihuse butuma habaho ibiganiro bifatika kandi birambuye.
global.privacyDesc: Uko itumanaho rigenda rirushaho kuba ikoranabuhanga, ubuzima bwite n'umutekano birarushaho kuba ingenzi. Abakoresha bashaka icyizere cy'uko ibiganiro byabo birinzwe. Ibintu nk'uburyo bwo gushakisha amakuru n'igenamiterere rigenzurwa n'abakoresha bifasha mu gutumanaho mu buryo butekanye.
global.futureDesc: Ahazaza h'itumanaho ku isi hashobora kuba harimo ibikoresho bigezweho, nko kohereza ubutumwa hifashishijwe ubuhanga bwa "AI", guhindura mu buryo bunoze, no kunoza ubunararibonye bw'abakoresha. Uko ikoranabuhanga rigenda ritera imbere, itumanaho rizakomeza kugenda ryoroha kandi rigera ku bantu benshi.
global.outro: Amasano nka Chatforia ni kimwe mu bigize iri hinduka, bifasha abantu guhuza byoroshye n'indimi zitandukanye n'imipaka.

index.title: Blog ya Chatforia
index.intro: Suzuma ubumenyi ku itumanaho, umutekano kuri interineti, n'uburyo ikoranabuhanga ryo kohereza ubutumwa rihuza abantu hirya no hino ku isi.
index.post1: Uburyo bwo kuganira mu mutekano kuri interineti
index.post3: Impamvu urubuga rwo kohereza ubutumwa ari ingenzi

chatSafely.title: Uburyo bwo kuganira mu mutekano kuri interineti
chatSafely.intro: Itumanaho ryo kuri interineti ryorohereje cyane kurusha mbere hose kuvugana n'abantu hirya no hino ku isi. Waba urimo utumanaho n'inshuti zawe, uhura n'abantu bashya, cyangwa ukorana mu buryo bw'umwuga, imbuga zo kohererezanya ubutumwa zigira uruhare runini mu buzima bwa buri munsi. Ariko, kugumana umutekano kuri interineti ni ingenzi kimwe no kugumana amakuru.

personalInfo.title: Rinda amakuru yawe bwite
personalInfo.body: Rimwe mu mategeko y'ingenzi agenga umutekano kuri interineti ni ukwirinda gusangiza abandi amakuru y'ibanga. Ibi birimo aderesi yawe yo mu rugo, amakuru y'imari, ijambo ry'ibanga, cyangwa andi makuru yose akuranga ashobora gukoreshwa nabi. Ndetse no mu biganiro bisanzwe, ni byiza kuzirikana ibyo usangiza n'abo usangiza.

safetyFeatures.title: Koresha Ibikoresho by'Umutekano byubatswemo
safetyFeatures.body: Uburyo bwo kohererezanya ubutumwa bugezweho nka Chatforia butanga ibikoresho bifasha abakoresha kuguma mu mutekano. Ibintu nko gukumira, gutanga raporo, no kugenzura ubuzima bwite byagenewe guha abakoresha ububasha ku byo bakora. Niba hari umuntu witwara nabi cyangwa akagutera kumererwa nabi, ugomba guhita ukoresha ibi bikoresho.

scams.title: Menya uburiganya
scams.body: Abatekamutwe bakunze gukoresha uburyo bwo kohereza ubutumwa kugira ngo bashuke abakoresha baboherereze amakuru yabo bwite cyangwa bohereze amafaranga. Witondere ubutumwa busa n'aho ari bwiza cyane ku buryo budashobora kuba ukuri, nk'ibitangwa bitunguranye, ubusabe bwihutirwa, cyangwa imirongo utazi. Buri gihe banza ugenzure uwo muvugana mbere yo kugira icyo ukora.

responsibly.title: Vugana neza n'abandi
responsibly.body: Guhanahana amakuru mu buryo burangwa n'icyubahiro bifasha mu gushyiraho ibidukikije birangwa n'umutekano kuri buri wese. Irinde kugira uruhare mu biganiro bibi cyangwa ibitutsi, kandi zirikana uburyo amagambo yawe ashobora kugira ingaruka ku bandi. Imibanire myiza igira uruhare mu gutuma abakoresha bose babona ibintu neza.

whySafety.title: Impamvu umutekano wo kuri interineti ari ingenzi
whySafety.body: Uko itumanaho rikoresha ikoranabuhanga rikomeza kwiyongera, ni ko kubungabunga umutekano n'icyizere birushaho kuba ingenzi. Mu gukurikiza amahame y'ibanze y'umutekano no gukoresha ibikoresho biboneka, abakoresha bashobora kwishimira inyungu zo kohereza ubutumwa mu gihe bigabanya ibyago.

chatSafely.conclusion: Gukomeza kwirinda kuri interineti ntibisaba ubumenyi buhanitse mu bya tekiniki—gusa kumenya ibintu, kwitonda no gutekereza neza. Ukoresheje ingeso nziza, ushobora kuvugana n'abantu mu mutekano kandi mufite icyizere.

about.title: Ku bijyanye na Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia ni ubutumwa bwizewe kandi bukoresha indimi nyinshi bufite uburyo bwo gushakisha amakuru kuva ku rundi ruhande kugeza ku rundi, guhindura ubutumwa ako kanya, no guhamagara mu ijwi/videwo. Intego yacu ni iyoroshye: gufasha abantu guhuza - mu mutekano, mu ibanga, no mu ndimi zitandukanye.

values.privacy: Kubanza kwigenga: Guhindura E2E mu buryo bw'umwimerere.
values.access: Uburyo bwo kwinjira kuri bose: Hindura mu buryo bwikora indimi zirenga 100.
values.control: Kugenzura: Gusiba ubutumwa no gusoma inyemezabuguzi ni amahitamo.
values.privacy_aria: Ibanga rya mbere: Uburyo bwo gufunga E2E busanzwe.
values.access_aria: Uburyo bwo kwinjira kuri bose: Guhindura mu buryo bwikora indimi zirenga 100.
values.control_aria: Igenzura: Gusiba ubutumwa no gusoma inyemezabuguzi ni amahitamo.

about.howDescription: Ubutumwa bushyirwa mu buryo buhishe kuri terefone yawe mbere yuko ivaho. Guhindura, gukoporora no guhuza terefone byagenewe kugabanya ibyo seriveri zacu zishobora kubona.
about.privacyTitle: Mbere na mbere ku buzima bwite
about.privacyDesc: Uburyo bwo gukingira amakuru kuva ku iherezo kugeza ku iherezo n'uburyo bwo kugenzura ubuzima bwite bwubatswe muri Chatforia kuva mu ntangiriro.
about.accessTitle: Uburyo bwo kwinjira kuri buri wese
about.accessDesc: Chatforia ifasha abantu guhuza indimi zitandukanye, ibikoresho bitandukanye, n'imipaka.
about.controlDesc: Hitamo uko ubutumwa bugaragara, igihe buzimira, n'uko konti yawe ikomeza kurindwa.

press.title: Itangazamakuru
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia ni porogaramu yo kohererezanya ubutumwa bwite ituma ibiganiro mu ndimi zitandukanye byoroha. Ubutumwa bushobora guhindurwa kuva ku mpera kugeza ku mpera, kandi ubuhinduzi bwubatswemo bushyigikira indimi zirenga 100 mu gihe nyacyo. Abakoresha bashobora gukoresha ubutumwa bubura, bagakomeza kubona inyemezabwishyu zo gusoma, kandi bagahuza ibikoresho bitandukanye. Iboneka kuri iOS, Android, na interineti.
press.scanTip: Kuri mudasobwa? Skena ukoresheje telefoni yawe kugira ngo ubone porogaramu.
press.qrAria: Fungura urubuga rwa interineti rwa Chatforia

careers.title: Akazi
careers.intro: Turi itsinda rito ry’abashinze Chatforia — itsinda ryigenga, ritanga ubutumwa ku isi yose kuri interineti, iOS, na Android. Niba ushishikajwe n’ubuzima bwite, uburyo bwo kubika amakuru, n’uburambe bwiza bw’abakoresha, twishimiye kumva ibyo uvuga.
careers.openRoles: Imirimo y'abashinze: Injeniyeri Mukuru w'Inyongera, Injeniyeri w'Inyongera (Node.js), Injeniyeri w'Inyongera/Imbuga (React), Injeniyeri w'Inyongera (iOS), Injeniyeri w'Inyongera (Android), DevOps/SRE, Injeniyeri w'Umutekano n'Uburinzi, Injeniyeri w'Ikoranabuhanga (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Uburyo bwo gusaba: Koresha buto iri hepfo kugirango wohereze CV yawe na links kuri imeri.
careers.whyBullets:
• Fasha kubaka ishingiro ry'ubutumwa bushya ku isi.
• Kohereza ubutumwa bukoreshwa kuri interineti, iOS, na Android.
• Korana n'uwashinze porogaramu ku buryo butaziguye ku bwubatsi n'icyerekezo cy'ibicuruzwa.
• Ufite ahantu hagira ingaruka zikomeye muri iyi porogaramu: ubutumwa, ijwi, videwo, uburyo bwo gushakisha amakuru, itumanaho, ubuhanga bwo gukora imibonano mpuzabitsina.
• Jyana mu ntangiriro — mbere y'uko umubare w'abakoresha ugera ku gipimo cy'umubare w'abakoresha.

advertise.title: Kwamamaza muri Chatforia
advertise.description: Gerera abakoresha ubutumwa bw’ingirakamaro mu gutanga ahantu heza kandi hizewe. Dutanga ububiko bw’amabaruwa ahantu hagaragara cyane, abaterankunga, n’amatangazo yo kwamamaza mu nzu. Abafatabuguzi ba mbere ntibabona amatangazo.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Dutanga kandi ibicuruzwa binyuze kuri Google AdSense. Ushobora kwibanda kuri Chatforia ukoresheje indangamuntu y'umwanditsi {{pubId}}, cyangwa ugakoresha fomu iri hepfo kugira ngo ubone inkunga itaziguye.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Dutanga kandi bimwe mu bikoresho tubinyujije kuri Google AdSense. Inkunga zitaziguye zirahari—koresha fomu iri hepfo.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Turimo kurangiza urutonde rw'amatangazo yacu. Tubwire ibijyanye n'ubukangurambaga bwawe maze tuzakugira inama yo gushyiramo.

why.deals: Amasezerano cyangwa porogaramu binyuze kuri AdSense/Google Ads

contact.errorSend: Ntibyashobokaga kohereza. Nyamuneka ohereza ubutumwa kuri support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: Iyi Politiki y'ibanga isobanura uburyo Chatforia ("twebwe", "twebwe") ikusanya, ikoresha, kandi igasangiza amakuru iyo ukoresha porogaramu na serivisi zacu. Dushushanya Chatforia kugira ngo tugabanye amakuru dushobora kubona.

infoWeCollect.title: Amakuru dukusanya
infoWeCollect.account: Amakuru ya konti (urugero: imeri/terefone) kugira ngo ukore kandi urinde konti yawe.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Ibikubiye mu buryo bwihishe (ubutumwa/guhamagara) bihishe kuva ku mpera kugeza ku mpera; ntabwo dushobora kubisoma.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Gusuzuma/gukoresha nk'inyandiko z'impanuka, ubwoko bw'igikoresho, cyangwa isesengura rikabije kugira ngo kunoze imikorere.

sms.title: Nimero za telefoni zigendanwa na SMS
sms.body: Iyo uhisemo gutanga nimero ya telefoni igendanwa, tuyikoresha kugira ngo dukoreshe ibintu nko kugenzura konti, kumenyesha abantu kwinjira, no kohererezanya ubutumwa bugufi binyuze kuri SMS aho byemewe. Dushobora kohereza ubutumwa bugufi bujyanye na konti yawe n'ibikorwa byawe kuri Chatforia. Ushobora kwiyambura kwakira ubutumwa bugufi igihe icyo ari cyo cyose usubiza ukoresheje ijambo ry'ingenzi rishyigikiwe ryo kwiyambura (nka "HAGARARA") cyangwa uhindura ibyo ukunda mu gutanga amakuru muri porogaramu. Ntitugurisha nimero yawe ya telefoni cyangwa ngo tuyikoreshe mu kwamamaza bidafite aho bihuriye.
sms.addRecipient: Ongeraho umuntu wakira amakuru haruguru kugira ngo utangire…

howWeUse.title: Uburyo dukoresha amakuru
howWeUse.provide: Tanga kandi urinde serivisi (kwemeza, gutahura spam/ihohoterwa).

sharing.title: Gusangira
sharing.body: Ntitugurisha amakuru bwite. Dushobora gusangira amakuru make n'abatunganya amakuru (urugero: ubutumwa bwo kohereza amakuru ku rubuga, isesengura) hakurikijwe amasezerano akomeye.

rights.title: Uburenganzira bwawe
rights.body: Bitewe n'akarere utuyemo (urugero: GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), ushobora gusaba uburenganzira bwo kubona, gukosora, gusiba, cyangwa kwiyambura uburyo bumwe na bumwe bwo gutunganya. Hamagara kuri: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Kubika amakuru no kuyacunga neza
retention.body: Dufite gusa ibikenewe kugira ngo dukore iyi serivisi kandi dushyire mu bikorwa umutekano usanzwe. Ibikubiye muri E2E ntibishobora guhindurwa ibanga.

children.title: Abana
children.body: Chatforia ntigenewe abana bari munsi y'imyaka 13 (cyangwa nk'uko amategeko y'aho utuye abiteganya).

changes.title: Impinduka
changes.body: Tuzashyiraho amakuru mashya hano tunahindure itariki "Yavuguruwe bwa nyuma".

contact.title: Twandikire
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, muri Amerika

intro.body: Ukoresheje Chatforia wemera aya Mabwiriza. Niba utemeranya nawe, ntugakoreshe serivisi.

accounts.title: Konti
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Tanga amakuru nyayo kandi urinde impapuro z'ibanga.

acceptableUse.title: Ikoreshwa ryemewe
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Nta bikubiyemo bitemewe n'amategeko, bihungabanya, cyangwa bihonyora amategeko; nta spam cyangwa ihohoterwa ryikora ku buryo bwikora.

sms.title: Itumanaho rya SMS
sms.body: Iyo utanze nimero ya telefoni igendanwa, wemera ko Chatforia ishobora kukoherereza ubutumwa bugufi bujyanye na konti yawe n'ikoreshwa rya serivisi, nk'amatangazo yo kwinjira, amatangazo y'umutekano, n'ubutumwa bujyanye n'ibiganiro utangije cyangwa witabira. Ntidukoresha SMS mu butumwa bwo kwamamaza cyangwa kwamamaza nta ruhushya rwawe rugaragara. Ibiciro bisanzwe by'ubutumwa n'amakuru bishobora gukurikizwa. Ushobora kwiyambura ubutumwa bugufi igihe icyo ari cyo cyose usubiza ukoresheje ijambo ry'ingenzi rishyigikiwe ryo kwiyambura (urugero, "HAGARARA") cyangwa uvugurura igenamiterere ry'amatangazo yawe muri porogaramu.

yourContent.title: Ibikubiye muri wowe
yourContent.body: Ugumana uburenganzira ku bikubiye mu nyandiko yawe. Uduha uburenganzira bukenewe bwo gukoresha serivisi (urugero: gukwirakwiza amakuru, kuyabika, kuyahindura).

disclaimer.title: Ibyitonderwa n'inshingano
disclaimer.body: Serivisi itangwa "uko iri" nta garanti. Ku rugero rwuzuye rwemewe n'amategeko, Chatforia ntabwo iryozwa indishyi zitaziguye cyangwa izikomokaho.

changes.title: Impinduka
changes.body: Dushobora kuvugurura aya mategeko; gukomeza gukoreshwa nyuma y'impinduka bivuze kwemera.

contact.title: Twandikire
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, muri Amerika

refund.title: Politiki yo Gusubiza Amafaranga
refund.intro: Muri Chatforia, twihatira gutanga serivisi nziza ku bakoresha bose. Iyi Politiki yo Gusubiza Amafaranga igaragaza igihe gusubizwa amafaranga bishobora gutangwa.

subscriptions.title: Kwiyandikisha
subscriptions.body: Kwiyandikisha byishyurwa mbere y'igihe buri gihe. Ushobora guhagarika igihe icyo ari cyo cyose ukoresheje igenamiterere rya konti yawe cyangwa urubuga rwakoreshejwe mu kugura.

eligibility.title: Ubushobozi bwo gusubizwa amafaranga
eligibility.body: Amafaranga ashobora gusubizwa ku mafaranga yishyurwa kabiri, amakosa yo kwishyura, cyangwa ibibazo bya tekiniki bibuza abantu kubona ibikoresho byishyurwa. Ubusabe bwose busuzumwa buri kimwe.

nonRefundable.title: Ntabwo bisubizwa
nonRefundable.body: Muri rusange ntidusubiza amafaranga ku gihe kitakoreshejwe, igihe cyo kwiyandikisha igice, cyangwa kunanirwa guhagarika mbere yo kongera kuvugurura.

thirdParty.title: Ibyaguzwe n'abandi
thirdParty.body: Iyo uguze ukoresheje urubuga rwa gatatu nka Apple App Store, amafaranga agomba gusabwa ako kanya ukoresheje izo urubuga.

contact.title: Twandikire

doNotSell.title: Ntugurishe cyangwa ngo usangize amakuru yanjye bwite
doNotSell.body: Chatforia ntigurisha amakuru bwite. Abaturage ba California baracyashobora kohereza ubusabe munsi ya CPRA bakoresheje akabuto kari hepfo.

cookies.title: Igenamiterere rya Cookies
cookies.body: Chatforia ikoresha cookies nkeya (urugero, session, security). Ntidukoresha cookies z'amatangazo y'abandi. Genzura cookies ukoresheje igenamiterere rya mushakisha yawe.

smsPolicy.title: Chatforia — Politiki ya SMS no Kwiyandikisha

whatWeSend.title: Ibyo twohereza
whatWeSend.body: Chatforia yohereza ubutumwa bugufi bujyanye na konti n'ibiganiro kuri nimero za terefone umukoresha yatanze kandi akabyemera. Ubutumwa busanzwe burimo kode zo kwinjira/kwemeza, ubutumwa bumenyesha ko ubutumwa butangwa, amatangazo y'umutekano, n'amavugurura y'ibikorwa bya konti.

optIn.title: Uburyo abakoresha biyandikisha
optIn.body: Abakoresha biyandikisha bandika nimero zabo za terefone mu gihe cyo kwiyandikisha no gushyira akamenyetso mu gasanduku k'ubuhamya bwa SMS ku ipaji yo kwiyandikisha cyangwa ku rubuga rwabugenewe.

optOut.title: Uburyo abakoresha bahitamo kwiyanga
optOut.stop: Gusubiza STOP kuri SMS iyo ari yo yose ya Chatforia kugira ngo ureke kwiyandika.
optOut.start: Subiza START kugira ngo wongere wiyandikishe.
